response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with only one brief role involving LabWindows/CVI and no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols critical to the role; his focus is overwhelmingly on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with no cloud (Azure) or industrial cybersecurity experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse systems
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in testing, CI/CD, and agile practices
concerns: Minimal C++ experience; no evidence of STL, concurrent programming, or industrial application development
No exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, REST in industrial contexts, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang — lacks Azure, cloud-native, or automation machinery domain experience
